# Ben Zachara — DevOps Engineer

> Personal portfolio and resume site for Ben Zachara, a DevOps engineer focused on Docker, K3s, CI/CD, and self-hosted cloud infrastructure.

## About

Ben Zachara is a DevOps engineer building reliable infrastructure with Docker, K3s, GitHub Actions, and practical host security on an Oracle Cloud VPS.

## Pages

- [Home](https://zachara.dev/): Landing page with introduction and tech stack
- [Resume](https://zachara.dev/resume): Full resume with skills, experience, and education
- [Projects](https://zachara.dev/projects): Hands-on DevOps project portfolio
- [Contact](https://zachara.dev/contact): Email and GitHub links
- [Full LLM Context](https://zachara.dev/llms-full.txt): Extended context with complete resume and project details

## Skills

- Containers & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes, K3s, containerd
- CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GHCR
- Cloud Platforms: Oracle Cloud, AWS, Azure
- Networking & Security: Traefik, Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban
- Scripting & Languages: Bash, Python, TypeScript, YAML

## Contact

- Email: bernard@zachara.dev
